channel.title: Personas on James Wade
channel.description: Recent content in Personas on James Wade

item.title: How to Teach
item.description: These notes are based on talks given by Greg Wilson, founder of the Carpentries. The first is a talk he gave in April 2019 for RStudio.1 The second is an update to that talk from July 2021 on his personal YouTube channel.2 Lesson 1: Design Curriculum for Learning Stages There are three stages of learners: novices, competents, and experts. The curriculum and teaching styles should be distinct for each learning stage.
